content.text:
[cron:6f2abfbb-e1e7-4f83-aed0-adb15a2092f5 每日飞书任务检查] 执行每日任务检查：
1. 调用飞书 API 获取当前用户的所有未完成任务
2. 检查是否有即将到期（24小时内）的任务
3. 汇总任务状态并发送给用户
4. 如有逾期任务，特别提醒

使用以下命令获取任务列表：
curl -s -X GET "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/task/v2/tasks" -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>"
Current time: Thursday, March 5th, 2026 — 9:02 AM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

message.errorMessage: Unexpected event order, got content_block_stop before "message_start"
